function_reachability: Is it impossible for function 'printf' to reach function 'main'?

dominators: Does the statement line 30:  <statement> printf("matmult finished.\n"); </statement> dominate line 14:  <statement> for (j = 0; j < Dim; j++) { </statement>?

data_dependency: Does the value of variable r at line 29: <statement> 	    r += C[i][i]; </statement> depend on the value of variable r at line 27: <statement>     r = 0; </statement>?

liveness: Does variable 'i' remain in use at the end of function 'main'?
